code:
fn double_opt(_ opt: Option<Int>) -> Option<Int>
  match opt
  when Some(x)
    Some(2 * x)
  when None
    None
  end
end

fn show_opt(_ opt: Option<Int>) -> String
  match opt
  when Some(v)
    "some=#{v}"
  when None
    "none"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let a = double_opt(Some(21))
  let b = double_opt(None)
  println(show_opt(a))
  println(show_opt(b))
end
